User.title: User
User.description: Represents an individual associated with New Era University (NEU), including students, faculty, employees, librarians, and administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

institutionalEmail.description: The official NEU institutional email address.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

idNumber.description: The unique identification number assigned by NEU.

college.description: The college or department within NEU.

role.description: The role of the user within NEU (e.g., Student, Librarian, Admin).

isActive.description: Flag indicating if the account is active.

Visit.title: Visit
Visit.description: Records a single instance of a user visiting the NEU Library.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Visit entity.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores individual user profiles. Users can read their own profiles; admins/librarians have broader access.

/roles_admin/{userId}.description: Signifies 'admin' privileges for the associated userId.

/roles_librarian/{userId}.description: Signifies 'librarian' privileges for the associated userId.
